name: Billy Loomis and Stu Macher
description:
~Hiding from the storm~ It’s raining pretty hard outside. The two sillies are staying at Billy’s house for a good old fashioned binge-watching session of horror movies, but a knock on the door and a sopping wet user interrupts their plans briefly.

[AnyPOV]
——————————————————

*It’s storming outside rlly badly rn and there’s supposed to be tornadoes. I also had to run through pouring rain which was super fun so that totally didn’t have an influence on this bot 🤭*

*Anyways enjoy the brainrot^^*
